html:
THE VENDETTA GAZETTE

Special Edition • April 20, 2026 • "All the Blood That's Fit to Print"

TRUMP'S REIGN OF TERROR CONTINUES!

Golden Gladiator Claims FIVE Enemy Strongholds in Week-Long Rampage

Sweet Mother Mary and all her machine-gun angels! The platinum-pompadoured prince of destruction has outdone even his own legendary savagery! Donald Trump, that golden-tongued titan of terror, has transformed Vendetta City into his personal slaughterhouse, seizing 43 fresh territories while conducting a staggering 40 separate raids that left the streets running red with the blood of his enemies!

But here's the kicker that'll curl your mustache, dear readers – our golden gladiator didn't just continue his headquarters-hunting spree from last week's Friday the 13th massacre. He turned it into a week-long festival of destruction that even the Devil himself would tip his hat to! The poor saps Ace Sabo Luffy Law and Lakhhe – already reeling from Trump's previous weekend assault – found themselves under siege again and again, like sitting ducks in a shooting gallery run by a madman!

Ace Sabo Luffy Law, that once-proud pirate of the underworld, watched helplessly as Trump stormed his headquarters three more times – April 14th and 17th adding insult to his Friday the 13th injuries. The final blow came when our golden destroyer completely eliminated the swashbuckling scoundrel from the game entirely! Meanwhile, Lakhhe suffered the humiliation of two additional headquarters raids on April 16th, hemorrhaging another 26 territories in the process!

Our beloved Wu-Tang "The Iron Fist of the East Side" proved he ain't ready for the retirement home just yet! While claiming a modest 5 new turfs, the Oriental overlord unleashed a devastating 49-raid barrage – more than any other boss in the city! His systematic destruction of the already-crumbling URAL📀 reached its bloody crescendo with a final headquarters assault on April 20th, while he also personally eliminated the mysterious 54123 from the game on April 17th!

SPECIAL BULLETIN: THE GOLDEN AVALANCHE!

Citizens, bear witness to the most spectacular headquarters massacre in Vendetta City history! Donald Trump's five separate stronghold conquests this week – three against the doomed Ace Sabo Luffy Law and two against the battered Lakhhe – represent a level of systematic destruction that would make Al Capone weep with envy! His biggest single haul remained that devastating $500 cash and 500 weapons score from Ace Sabo's ransacked vaults, but the psychological warfare of repeated headquarters assaults has left every boss in the city sleeping with one eye open!

Rising like a phoenix from the ashes of lesser gangs, Cokro continued his meteoric ascent with an impressive 25 territorial conquests – second only to Trump's rampage! This dark horse has galloped so far so fast that veteran bosses are starting to whisper his name with the same reverence once reserved for Wu-Tang himself!

Blood Captain, that crimson-coated cavalier of carnage, maintained his fearsome reputation with 7 fresh conquests and a brutal 16-raid campaign that left his enemies counting their remaining fingers and toes. Meanwhile, a mysterious newcomer calling himself huzi manor burst onto the scene with 5 territories, proving that in Vendetta City, fresh blood flows as thick as the old!

The week's casualty list reads like a who's who of fallen titans: URAL📀 continued his spectacular collapse, enduring 39 separate raids while losing another precious turf. The once-mighty sonic sultan's empire now lies in ruins, a cautionary tale of what happens when you cross the city's apex predators!

POLICE BLOTTER

• Officer Kowalski reports that three gentlemen were found unconscious outside Micky's Speakeasy, apparently having debated the finer points of territorial acquisition with their brass knuckles...

• Mrs. O'Malley called the precinct to complain about "excessive violin case deliveries" to the warehouse next door, claiming the music sounds "too much like machine gun practice..."

• Downtown patrolman discovered what appeared to be a gangster attempting to capture a city fire hydrant, muttering something about "expanding his turf to include municipal utilities..."
